code.text: Specimen information

text.div:
Specimen information

Test11-NOV-2015Specimen
Appearance of UrineCloudy urineUrine
Odor of UrineUrine smell ammoniacalUrine
Clarity of UrineTranslucentUrine
Color of UrineBrown colorUrine

Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
Renal function is mildly impaired (elevated creatinine), with associated proteinuria and abnormal urine findings (cloudy, brown, ammoniacal odor, low specific gravity, elevated protein and ketones). No evidence of urinary tract infection (negative nitrites/leukocytes). Blood glucose and HbA1c are low, suggesting possible hypoglycemia or malnutrition. Recommend clinical correlation for renal impairment, possible dehydration, and assessment of nutritional status.
